zh.Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素
zh.Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Talbot於1340年出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，她的父親John de Talbot21歲，母親Julian de Grey27歲。她於1364年1月20日之前與Ralph Parles MP結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1377年4月26日之前在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素
zh-hans.Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England: 英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Talbot于1340年出生在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素时，她的父亲John de Talbot21岁，母亲Julian de Grey27岁。她于1364年1月20日之前与Ralph Parles MP结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1377年4月26日之前在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Talbot was born in 1340, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, her father, John de Talbot, was 21 and her mother, Julian de Grey, was 27. She married Ralph Parles MP before 20 January 1364. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 26 April 1377, in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Talbot est née en 1340, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Talbot, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Julian de Grey, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Parles MP avant 20 janvier 1364. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 26 avril 1377, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Talbot 1340 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Talbot 21 und ihre Mutter Julian de Grey 27. Sie hat vor 20. Januar 1364 Ralph Parles MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 26. April 1377 in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Talbot è nata il nel 1340 nel Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John de Talbot, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Julian de Grey, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Parles MP prima del 20 gennaio 1364. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 26 aprile 1377, nel Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Talbotが1340年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父John de Talbotは21歳，母Julian de Greyは27歳であった。1364年1月20日以前にRalph Parles MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1377年4月26日以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Talbot(이)가 1340년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Talbot(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julian de Grey(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1364년 1월 20일 이전 Ralph Parles MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 4월 26일 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했다.

mn.Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England: Thurleigh, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Talbot nasceu em 1340, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Talbot, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Julian de Grey, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Parles MP antes 20 de janeiro de 1364. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 26 de abril de 1377, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Talbot родилась в 1340 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Talbot было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Julian de Grey, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Parles MP перед 20 январь 1364 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 26 апрель 1377 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Talbot nació en 1340, en Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Talbot, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Julian de Grey, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph Parles MP antes de 20 de enero de 1364. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 26 de abril de 1377, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
